Name: item.weapon.worn-shortsword
Description: A nicked frontier blade. It has seen better seasons.

Name: item.armor.worn-shield
Description: Iron-banded wood, scarred from old skirmishes.

Name: item.armor.travelers-jerkin
Description: Boiled leather, light and quiet on the path.

Name: item.consumable.lesser-restorative
Description: A bitter draught that knits small wounds.

Name: item.reagent.skitter-gland
Description: A faintly luminous gland prized by herbalists.

Name: item.quest.shard-fragment-of-vael
Description: A jagged sliver of a broken Crown. It hums against your palm and does not hollow you.

Name: item.trinket.rift-warded-band
Description: A Covenant ring that steadies the wearer near a Rift.

Name: item.weapon.vaelsteel-blade
Description: Reforged from waystation steel and a touch of Shard-light.
